title: Double Sided Pet Grooming Brush, Small Dog Fur Brush, 17.5 cm
features: DUAL-SIDED DESIGN: Features two distinct brush surfaces - one side with fine pins for detangling and another with firm bristles for removing loose fur and debris
COMPACT SIZE: 17.5 cm length makes this brush perfect for small dogs and easy to handle during grooming sessions
ERGONOMIC HANDLE: Comfortable grip design reduces hand fatigue during extended grooming sessions
GENTLE GROOMING: Rounded pins and soft bristles ensure a comfortable grooming experience for your pet whilst effectively removing loose hair
VERSATILE USE: Suitable for both short and long-haired small dogs, helping maintain a healthy and shiny coat through regular grooming
description: Keep your furry friend's coat looking pristine with this versatile double-sided pet grooming brush. At 17.5 cm in length, this compact brush is perfectly sized for small dogs and provides complete grooming control. One side features fine bristles ideal for removing loose fur, dirt, and dander, while the other side helps detangle and smooth the coat. The ergonomic design ensures comfortable handling during grooming sessions, making it easier to reach all areas of your pet's coat. Regular use helps distribute natural oils throughout the fur, promoting a healthier, shinier coat. This brush is an essential tool for maintaining your small dog's coat between professional grooming appointments, helping to reduce shedding around your home. The practical size makes it convenient to store and perfect for travel. Suitable for both short and medium-length coats, this grooming brush helps create a bonding experience with your pet while keeping their fur in top condition.
